existing_patterns: Router uses lazy() + SuspenseWrapper; index route = GamePage, /office = GamePage, /overview = DashboardPage
AppLayout checks isGameRoute to conditionally hide Header and padding
Sidebar navItems array is single source for nav links with useLocation for active state
Game panels use PARCHMENT theme + PIXEL_CARD from panelUtils.ts — NOT shadcn
OpsPanel reads from useDashboardStore: workState?.features?.features and backlogs
CeoBrief fetches via API_BASE/api/state/artifact-content, uses workState?.conductor
SidePanel routes via PanelContent switch on activeTab or selected.type
GameHeader exports HudPanel type, uses HudButton component
SchedulerCard has its own 30s fetch cycle + toggle endpoint (POST /api/scheduler/toggle)
risks: Route preservation: toggle mechanism (state vs navigation) affects browser history
Duplicate data fetching if both views load simultaneously
Scheduler toggle mutation exposure in read-only game context
Sidebar active-state highlighting may break when consolidating items
CeoBrief is 344 lines with complex state — not a simple restyle
GameHeader already crowded on mobile with 4 HUD buttons
recommendations: Use React state in AppLayout for toggle, store preference in localStorage
Place toggle in AppLayout/Sidebar header area, not GameHeader
Extract useCeoBriefData.ts shared hook for both UIs
Scheduler in OpsPanel: read-only SchedulerSummary section with shared hook
Merge Office/Overview into single nav item + toggle icon
Add Brief section to existing OpsPanel.tsx rather than new panel file
Preserve CeoBrief.tsx and SchedulerCard.tsx untouched — game panels consume shared hooks
Update AppLayout isGameRoute check to account for toggle state
